tasks.label: 🚀 Iniciar Sessão
tasks.detail: npm run session:start — restaura contexto, verifica HANDOFF e IDEIAS

tasks.label: 📋 Pré-PR Check
tasks.detail: npm run pre-pr — build + testes + regras + docs antes do PR

tasks.label: 📬 Feedbacks Pendentes
tasks.detail: npm run feedback:check — consulta feedbacks de usuários no Supabase

tasks.label: 📝 Gerar Relatório
tasks.detail: npm run report — relatório HTML do diff atual

tasks.label: 🔧 Instalar Git Hooks
tasks.detail: npm run hooks:install — ativa .githooks (bloqueio de main)

tasks.label: 🏁 Finalizar Sessão
tasks.detail: npm run session:end — commit + handoff + push

tasks.label: 💭 Capturar Ideia
tasks.detail: npm run think "ideia" — salva em IDEIAS.md
